plans.name: Personal
plans.summary: Limited and capped. Agent memory and facts for up to 25 agents in one realm. No support included.

plans.name: Professional
plans.summary: Capped. Memory, facts, secrets, and collaboration for 250 agents across 10 realms, support included.

plans.name: Team
plans.summary: Coming soon. Everything in Professional with higher limits, plus usage-based billing.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.summary: Coming soon. Everything in Team with custom pricing and support; details to follow.
